mapper.select: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM extracurricular WHERE category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT student_name AS studentName, SUM(points) AS totalPoints, COUNT(*) AS activityCount FROM extracurricular WHERE points IS NOT NULL GROUP BY student_name ORDER BY totalPoints DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM extracurricular GROUP BY status
SELECT SUM(points) AS totalPoints, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, ROUND(AVG(points), 2) AS avgPoints FROM extracurricular WHERE points IS NOT NULL
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM extracurricular WHERE date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12
